headline: Boston Scientific Corp (NYSE:BSX): A Decent Value Play with Strong Fundamentals and an Attractive Valuation
summary: Discover Boston Scientific (BSX) as a 'Decent Value' stock: strong profitability, solid growth, and a low P/E ratio, offering a margin of safety for value investors.

headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Valuation Reset After Watchman Growth Concerns And Intensifying Competition
summary: Boston Scientific (BSX) stock has been under pressure after management flagged slowing growth in its Watchman heart implant business, a key contributor to earnings. The company reaffirmed full year guidance and is facing fresh competition in left atrial appendage closure. See our latest analysis for Boston Scientific. The sharp reset in expectations for Watchman growth has coincided with a steep share price selloff, with the stock down 37.1% over three months and the 1 year total shareholder...
